title: 30 Tex. Admin. Code § 101.3 - Circumvention
text:
No person shall use any plan, activity, device or
contrivance which the executive director determines will, without resulting in
an actual reduction of air contaminants, conceal or appear to minimize the
effects of an emission which would otherwise constitute a violation of the Act
or regulations. Air introduced for dilution purposes only is considered a
circumvention of the regulations.
